headline: Beyond Meat Q4 Loss Wider Than Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
summary: BYND faces steep sales and margin pressure as weak demand and rising costs weigh on results, with cautious first-quarter 2026 revenue guidance ahead.

raw.headline: Beyond Meat Q4 Loss Wider Than Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
raw.summary: BYND faces steep sales and margin pressure as weak demand and rising costs weigh on results, with cautious first-quarter 2026 revenue guidance ahead.

headline: Here's Why Kenvue (KVUE) Could be Great Choice for a Bottom Fisher
summary: Kenvue (KVUE) appears to have found support after losing some value lately, as indicated by the formation of a hammer chart. In addition to this technical chart pattern, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher enhances the stock's potential for a turnaround in the near term.

headline: PRPL Q4 Loss Narrower Than Estimates, Sales Rise on Wholesale Strength
summary: Purple's Q4 loss narrows and sales rise 9.1% y/y as wholesale strength, cost cuts and Rejuvenate 2.0 momentum marked a turnaround in 2026.
